artefacts.expected: GENERATED in Week 1 from inputs, then frozen

subject: English
structure: Two papers. P1: Literature (When Stars are Scattered ch.1–17) + Unseen Poetry (65 marks). P2: Comprehension (25) + Language Structure (35) + Visual Literacy (20).

baseline.note: Totals not recorded in project history — take from marks/ artefacts. Comprehension of content was solid; marks lost on technique naming and elaboration

known_gaps.description: Names the WORD used instead of the technique (writes 'hisses' instead of 'onomatopoeia')
Minimal answers without elaboration; mark allocation ignored (2 marks = 2 valid points). Frameworks in use: L.F.Q.E. (Lock, Find, Quote, Explain) and P.E.E. (Point, Evidence, Explain)

tolerance.note: Heavy CLAUDE_ASSIST share — grading gate leans on the ±0.5 per-question suggestion comparison
